trend_summary: Twin Vew's PSF has risen sharply from a low of S$1,214 psf in May 2018 (early launch period) to a high of S$2,050 psf in March 2026, reflecting strong appreciation since TOP in 2021. Over the last 12 months, sale prices have ranged from S$1,699 to S$2,050 psf, averaging S$1,886 psf — a roughly 55-70% gain from initial launch pricing. The project has clearly benefited from the maturing Clementi/West Coast precinct and proximity to the upcoming Jurong Lake District.
insights: Twin Vew is a 520-unit, 99-year leasehold development by CSC Land Group, completed in 2021 on a 12,343 sqm site along West Coast Vale in District 5.
Buyer profile skews heavily Singaporean (83.5%) with PRs at 15.3% and foreigners at just 1.2%, suggesting an owner-occupier dominated estate that should support price stability.
Current rental yield of ~3.7% (avg S$5.80 psf pm) is healthy for a District 5 condo and is supported by proximity to Clementi MRT, Jurong East MRT and the future second CBD at Jurong Lake District.

Detailed unit-level transaction rows were not accessible — EdgeProp gates the full transaction table behind a login, and 99.co/SRX returned HTTP 403. Aggregate stats above are sourced from EdgeProp's URA-derived summary.
data_source: EdgeProp (aggregate stats only; unit-level rows behind login). 99.co and SRX returned 403.
